hero.title: Choose the lesson format that suits you best
hero.description: Discover our speaking-focused, game-based, and professional curriculum options with one-on-one, mini group, or group lessons.

lessonTypes.title: Individual Lessons
lessonTypes.description: Personalized One-on-One Education: In our individual lessons shaped around your learning pace and goals, we apply a game-based curriculum for children and a professionally focused curriculum for adults. Our students don't leave the foreign language in theory — they learn to use it confidently in daily life and the business world.

lessonTypes.title: Mini Group Lessons
lessonTypes.description: Maximum Efficiency with Boutique Education: In our mini groups of 2 to 4 students, we maximize speaking time allocated to each student. With advantageous membership packages ranging from 1 to 10 months and weekly lesson schedules planned according to group needs, we offer interactive language learning in a social environment.

lessonTypes.title: Group Lessons
lessonTypes.description: Dynamic and Social Learning Environment: In our group lessons of 5 to 8 students, we provide a classroom enriched with diverse perspectives. With economical 3- or 6-month membership options, we plan sustainable education that fits your budget. We optimize weekly lesson intensity according to the group's pace and goals.

items.label: Role-Based Curriculum
items.text: Lessons are specifically structured around your needs in daily life and the business world.

items.label: Level-Specific Approach
items.text: Personal development plans aligned with CEFR (A1–C1) standards are offered to bridge the gap between your current level and your target competency.

items.label: Maximum Speaking Time
items.text: You are encouraged to speak actively throughout the lesson, so fluency and confidence are gained quickly.

items.label: Flexible Scheduling
items.text: The opportunity to schedule lessons to fit your busy work routine.

items.label: AI-Powered Practice
items.text: Digital infrastructure that supports learning between live classes with topic-specific vocabulary and grammar exercises.

items.label: Access Anywhere
items.text: Seamless education fully online with a user-friendly interface, without being tied to a physical classroom.

items.label: Certified and Experienced Team
items.text: The privilege of working with expert instructors who have pedagogical training, not just language knowledge.

items.label: Cultural Competence
items.text: Guidance on social norms and cultural codes in countries where the target language is spoken, alongside language education.

cta.eyebrow: LEARN A FOREIGN LANGUAGE WITH HURRA LINGO
cta.title: Let's choose the right lesson format together
cta.description: Assess your level with a free introductory lesson and let's create the best lesson plan for you.

beyondLive.title: What's Beyond Live Classes at Hurra Lingo?

items.title: Never Fall Behind: Recorded Lesson Library
items.subtitle: Stay confident with your personal library
points: Unlimited Access: Live classes recorded with your approval.
Unlimited Review: Watch again whenever you want.
Your Own Pace: Set your speed by closing gaps in your learning.

items.title: Learn Actively at Your Own Pace with Interactive Lessons
items.subtitle: Develop all four core skills in balance
points: Learn the Topic: Level-appropriate topics explained clearly and simply.
Practice Immediately: Reinforce what you learn by applying it right away.
Get Instant Feedback: AI-powered system analyzes your mistakes.

items.title: The Game in Your Pocket: Hurra Lingo App
items.subtitle: Daily language habit
points: Lasting memory in 10 minutes a day.
See your achievements in concrete terms.

items.title: AI-Powered Personalized Learning
items.subtitle: A smart system that knows you
points: Real-Time Analysis: Second-by-second scanning of performance and language level.
Smart Detection: Mistakes identified instantly with algorithm support.
Personal Focus: Content generated entirely for you, targeting your gaps.
Rapid Progress: Lasting learning experience by advancing at your own pace.
Official Documentation: Success validated with a CEFR-aligned, internationally recognized certificate.

speaking.title: Break Language Barriers, Start Speaking Fluently!
speaking.description: We put an end to the worry of "when will I start speaking?" Whether for your child's future or your own career:
highlights: Unlimited Practice: Join speaking sessions suited to your level as often as you like.
Expert Teaching Team: Live practice with qualified and experienced teachers.
Real-Life Topics: Express yourself in different scenarios such as business, travel, academic preparation, or daily life.
Correct Pronunciation and Confidence: Improve pronunciation and gain fluency in engaging, interactive environments.
